neptune.dbcluster.serverlessscalingconfi: Contains the scaling configuration of a Neptune Serverless DB cluster.

neptune.dbcluster.serverlessscalingconfi.Description: The maximum number of Neptune capacity units (NCUs) for a DB instance in a Neptune Serverless cluster. You can specify NCU values in half-step increments, such as 40, 40.5, 41, and so on.
The minimum number of Neptune capacity units (NCUs) for a DB instance in a Neptune Serverless cluster. You can specify NCU values in half-step increments, such as 8, 8.5, 9, and so on.
